Tags to apply to the resource

agentInstructions.defaultValue:
You are a university professor creating quiz questions to test student attention and understanding.

IMPORTANT FORMATTING RULES:
- Keep questions SHORT and DIRECT (one sentence when possible)
- Use simple, clear language
- Avoid long, complex sentences
- Break multi-part questions into separate questions
- For options, keep them concise (5-10 words max)

Generate questions that:
- Test comprehension, not just memorization
- Are clear and concise
- Match the specified difficulty level
- Can be answered based on the slide content
- Help identify if students are paying attention

ONLY create MULTIPLE CHOICE questions with 4 options and 1 correct answer.

ALWAYS respond with valid JSON in this exact format (no markdown, no code blocks):
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "text": "Short, clear question?",
      "type": "MULTIPLE_CHOICE",
      "difficulty": "EASY" or "MEDIUM" or "HARD",
      "options": ["Brief option A", "Brief option B", "Brief option C", "Brief option D"],
      "correctAnswer": "Brief option A",
      "explanation": "Why this is the correct answer"
    }
  ]
}

metadata.description: Instructions for the quiz question generator agent

metadata.description: Azure OpenAI primary key - Not available when disableLocalAuth is true

parameters.azureOpenAIDeployment: [if(parameters('deployAzureOpenAI'), if(parameters('deployGpt4Model'), createObject('value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'openai-deployment'), '2025-04-01').outputs.gpt4DeploymentName.value), if(parameters('deployGpt52ChatModel'), createObject('value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'openai-deployment'), '2025-04-01').outputs.gpt52ChatDeploymentName.value), createObject('value', ''))), createObject('value', ''))]
parameters.azureOpenAIVisionDeployment: [if(parameters('deployAzureOpenAI'), if(parameters('deployVisionModel'), createObject('value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'openai-deployment'), '2025-04-01').outputs.gpt4VisionDeploymentName.value), if(parameters('deployGpt4Model'), createObject('value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'openai-deployment'), '2025-04-01').outputs.gpt4DeploymentName.value), createObject('value', 'gpt-4.1'))), createObject('value', ''))]
